blocks.name: Hero Banner
blocks.description: Full-width hero image with heading overlay, optional subheading and CTA button. Used as primary page entry point on landing and hub pages.

variations.name: Video Hero
variations.description: Hero with background video (autoplay, muted) plus heading and CTA. Includes pause/play button.

variations.name: Image Hero
variations.description: Full-width static image with centered H1 heading + subheading + optional CTA link.

variations.name: Simple Hero
variations.description: Full-width image only, no text overlay. Used as article/story header.

variations.name: Detail Page Hero
variations.description: Hero image with centered topic heading and descriptive subheading.

blocks.name: Navigation Header
blocks.description: Global site header with AbbVie logo, primary mega-menu navigation (5 categories), search, and region/country selector.

variations.name: Default Header
variations.description: Standard header with logo, 5-item mega-menu, search, and globe icon for region selector.

blocks.name: Mega Menu Panel
blocks.description: Expandable accordion-style navigation panel with multi-level sub-items, 'Go to Page' anchor links.

variations.name: Default Panel
variations.description: Multi-level expandable panel with category headers and nested links.

blocks.name: Breadcrumb
blocks.description: Hierarchical path navigation showing page location within site structure. Each parent segment is a clickable link.

variations.name: Multi-Level Breadcrumb
variations.description: Full hierarchy breadcrumb (e.g. Who We Are > Our Leaders > Person Name).

variations.name: Single Level Breadcrumb
variations.description: Simple parent-only breadcrumb (e.g. 'All Stories').

blocks.name: Card Grid
blocks.description: Responsive grid of cards with image, heading, description, and CTA link.

variations.name: Three Column Cards
variations.description: 3 cards in a row, each with image + heading + description + link. Used on landing pages.

variations.name: Four Column Story Cards
variations.description: 4 story cards with image, title, description, and action-oriented CTA.

variations.name: Article Cards
variations.description: 3-column cards with image, category tag, date, title, excerpt, read time, and 'Read Article' CTA.

blocks.name: Card
blocks.description: Individual card component within a card grid.

variations.name: Feature Card
variations.description: Image (landscape) + heading + description + link. Basic navigation card.

variations.name: Story Card
variations.description: Image + date + category tag + title + description + read time + link.

variations.name: Article Card
variations.description: Image + category + date + title + excerpt + 'Read Article' CTA + reading time.

variations.name: Resource Card
variations.description: Single card with image, title, description, and PDF/download link.

blocks.name: Press Release Carousel
blocks.description: Horizontal carousel of press release items with date and title. Includes prev/next navigation buttons.

variations.name: Default Carousel
variations.description: 3-slide carousel with date + headline per slide, navigated via arrow buttons.

blocks.name: Featured Story
blocks.description: Prominent story card with large image (1:1 or landscape), date, category, title, description, read time, and link.

variations.name: Default Featured Story
variations.description: Two-column layout with large image left, metadata and text right.

blocks.name: Stat Counter
blocks.description: Large numerical statistic with unit/symbol and label text. Displays key metrics prominently.

variations.name: Inline Stat
variations.description: Large number + symbol (e.g. 75+, ~57k, 32%) with descriptive label below.

variations.name: Stats Grid
variations.description: 6 stat blocks in horizontal layout (90+ compounds, ~50 NMEs, 9 R&D centers, etc.).

blocks.name: Two Column Feature
blocks.description: Side-by-side layout with image on one side and text content (heading, body, CTA) on the other. Alternating left/right variants.

variations.name: Image Left
variations.description: Image on left, text + heading + CTA on right.

variations.name: Image Right
variations.description: Text + heading + CTA on left, image on right.

variations.name: Video Left
variations.description: Video thumbnail with play button on left, quote/text on right.

blocks.name: Video Embed
blocks.description: Embedded video player with poster image thumbnail, play button overlay, and duration badge.

variations.name: Standalone Video
variations.description: Centered video with poster image, title, description, and duration badge.

variations.name: Inline Article Video
variations.description: Video embedded within article body content.

blocks.name: Accordion
blocks.description: Expandable/collapsible content panels with global Expand All / Collapse All controls.

variations.name: FAQ Accordion
variations.description: Question/answer format with 4+ items and global toggle.

variations.name: Medicine List Accordion
variations.description: 50+ items with medicine name, EN/ES PDF download links per item.

variations.name: Disease Category Accordion
variations.description: Grouped expandable sections (Blood Cancers, Solid Tumors) with disease details.

blocks.name: Pull Quote
blocks.description: Highlighted quote with headshot thumbnail, name, title, and company attribution.

variations.name: Quote with Headshot
variations.description: Quote text + circular headshot (~100-150px) + name/title/company.

variations.name: Employee Testimonial
variations.description: Quote + headshot + name + role. Used for employee stories.

blocks.name: CTA Block
blocks.description: Call-to-action section with heading, body text, and prominent button or link.

variations.name: Centered CTA
variations.description: Centered heading + text + link button. Often used for career/recruitment.

variations.name: CTA with Image
variations.description: Side-by-side image + heading + body + button.

blocks.name: Profile Card Grid
blocks.description: Responsive grid of profile cards for leadership team display.

variations.name: Executive Grid
variations.description: Portrait headshot + name + title + 'Meet [Name]' link in 2-3 column responsive grid.

blocks.name: Profile Card
blocks.description: Individual person card within the profile grid.

variations.name: Leader Card
variations.description: Square headshot + full name + title + 'Meet [Name]' CTA link.

blocks.name: Leader Bio
blocks.description: Full biography layout with headshot, name, title, multi-paragraph bio, and social link.

variations.name: Executive Bio
variations.description: Square headshot + H1 name + subtitle title + 4 bio paragraphs + LinkedIn link.

variations.name: R&D Leader Bio
variations.description: Same structure as executive bio, used for science/R&D leadership.

blocks.name: Section Heading
blocks.description: Section header with uppercase category label, H2/H3 headline, and supporting body text.

variations.name: Labeled Section Heading
variations.description: Uppercase category label (e.g. 'INVESTOR RESOURCES') + H3 tagline + body text.

variations.name: Simple Section Heading
variations.description: H2 heading with optional subheading paragraph.

blocks.name: Section Divider
blocks.description: Horizontal rule separator between major content sections.

variations.name: Default Divider
variations.description: Simple horizontal rule with vertical spacing above/below.

blocks.name: Article Metadata Bar
blocks.description: Horizontal bar showing article date, category tag (linked), and reading time.

variations.name: Default Metadata Bar
variations.description: Date + category link + 'X Minute Read' in horizontal layout.

blocks.name: Related Content
blocks.description: Bottom-of-page section with 3 related article/page cards.

variations.name: Related Articles
variations.description: 3-column card grid with thumbnail + category + title + CTA.

variations.name: Related Topics
variations.description: Horizontal list of topic links (e.g. Immunology, Neuroscience, Eye Care).

blocks.name: Link List
blocks.description: Grouped vertical list of links, sometimes under a category heading. Used for quick links and related pages.

variations.name: Quick Links
variations.description: Category heading + vertical list of external/internal links with arrow icons.

variations.name: Topics List
variations.description: Simple list of 4-6 related page links, no icons.

blocks.name: Investor Resources
blocks.description: Composite block with earnings card + resource links for investor section of homepage.

variations.name: Default Investor Block
variations.description: Earnings release card (category + title + CTA) + 3 quick links (events, stakeholders, annual report).

blocks.name: Address Block
blocks.description: Structured address display with location name, street address, city/state/zip, and optional phone number.

variations.name: Default Address
variations.description: Location heading + multi-line address + optional tel: phone link.

blocks.name: Board/Committee List
blocks.description: Vertical text list of board members or committee assignments with names, titles, and affiliations.

variations.name: Board Members List
variations.description: Bold name + title + affiliation + location.

variations.name: Committee Assignments
variations.description: Grouped sections (Audit, Compensation, etc.) with header + member names.

blocks.name: Exit Warning Modal
blocks.description: Confirmation dialog shown when user clicks external link. 'You are about to leave AbbVie' with Yes/No buttons.

variations.name: Default Exit Modal
variations.description: Modal with warning text + 'No, I disagree' + 'Yes, I agree' buttons.

blocks.name: Global Footer
blocks.description: Multi-column footer with logo, section navigation, social media icons, popular pages, external links, and legal bar.

variations.name: Default Footer
variations.description: Logo + 5 nav columns + social icons (6) + popular pages + external links + legal links + copyright.

blocks.name: Region Selector
blocks.description: Country/region chooser organized by continent with 50+ country links.

variations.name: Header Region Selector
variations.description: Globe icon trigger opening region selection overlay.
